prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response:
I am so sorry to hear about your mother passing away. Please know that I am here to support you during this difficult time. I will be praying for your family as you navigate these challenging days of grieving and loss. Please let me know if there is anything I can do to help. 

Warmest hugs,
[Assistant's name]
